subcodes.first_line: O Ibrahim! Hearken thou unto the Call of thy Lord, the Most Glorious, which hath been raised from His Most Exalted, Most Sublime Station. Verily He [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ابراهیم ان استمع ندآء ربک الابهی الذی ارتفع من مقامه الاسمی الاسنی انه
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @call to action, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @Shrines and Holy places
